节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides methods to operate or manage Bluetooth.
Indicate the profile connection state.
Bluetooth device address.
create a Gatt server instance.

节点.功能描述: Create a ble scanner instance. Each ble scanner instance can be independently started or stopped.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the list of devices in the connected status. It is used to obtain the connected devices corresponding to the profile.
注释信息: @param { BleProfile } profile - The profile in the BLE protocol.
@returns { Array<string> } Returns the list of device address.

parameters.说明: The profile in the BLE protocol.

节点.return_description: Returns the list of device address.

节点.功能描述:
Starts scanning for specified BLE devices with filters. If you do not want to use filter, set this parameter to {@code null}. {@link ScanOptions#interval} set to 0, {@link ScanOptions#dutyMode} set to {@link SCAN_MODE_LOW_POWER} and {@link ScanOptions#matchMode} set to {@link MATCH_MODE_AGGRESSIVE}. and {@link ScanOptions#phyType} set to {@link PHY_LE_ALL_SUPPORTED}.
2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Array<ScanFilter> } filters - Indicates the list of filters used to filter out specified devices.
@param { ScanOptions } options - Indicates the parameters for scanning and if the user does not assign a value, the default value will be used.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.

parameters.说明: Indicates the list of filters used to filter out specified devices.
Indicates the parameters for scanning and if the user does not assign a value, the default value will be used.

error_codes.description: Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.

节点.功能描述: Stops BLE scanning.

Starts BLE advertising. - If only {@link AdvertiseData#includeDeviceName} is set to true, the local name will be carried in the broadcast packet. - If only {@link AdvertiseData#advertiseName} is set, its value will be used as a custom name and carried in the broadcast packet. - If {@link AdvertiseData#includeDeviceName} is set to true and {@link AdvertiseData#advertiseName} is specified, the {@link AdvertiseData#advertiseName} property will take effect. - To set {@link AdvertiseData#advertiseName}, ensure that ohos.permission.MANAGE_BLUETOOTH_ADVERTISER_NAME has been added. ohos.permission.MANAGE_BLUETOOTH_ADVERTISER_NAME)
2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { AdvertiseSetting } setting - Indicates the settings for BLE advertising.
@param { AdvertiseData } advData - Indicates the advertising data.
@param { AdvertiseData } advResponse - Indicates the scan response associated with the advertising data.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
@throws { BusinessError } 2900010 - The number of advertising resources reaches the upper limit.
@throws { BusinessError } 2902054 - The length of the advertising data exceeds the upper limit.

parameters.说明: Indicates the settings for BLE advertising.
Indicates the advertising data.
Indicates the scan response associated with the advertising data.

error_codes.description: Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
The number of advertising resources reaches the upper limit.
The length of the advertising data exceeds the upper limit.

节点.功能描述: Stops BLE advertising.

Starts BLE advertising. The API returns a advertising ID. The ID can be used to temporarily enable or disable this advertising using the API {@link enableAdvertising} or {@link disableAdvertising}. To completely stop the advertising corresponding to the ID, invoke the API {@link stopAdvertising} with ID. - If only {@link AdvertiseData#includeDeviceName} is set to true, the local name will be carried in the broadcast packet. - If only {@link AdvertiseData#advertiseName} is set, its value will be used as a custom name and carried in the broadcast packet. - If {@link AdvertiseData#includeDeviceName} is set to true and {@link AdvertiseData#advertiseName} is specified, the {@link AdvertiseData#advertiseName} property will take effect. - To set {@link AdvertiseData#advertiseName}, ensure that ohos.permission.MANAGE_BLUETOOTH_ADVERTISER_NAME has been added. ohos.permission.MANAGE_BLUETOOTH_ADVERTISER_NAME)
2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { AdvertisingParams } advertisingParams - Indicates the params for BLE advertising.
@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - the callback of advertise ID.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
@throws { BusinessError } 2900010 - The number of advertising resources reaches the upper limit.
@throws { BusinessError } 2902054 - The length of the advertising data exceeds the upper limit.

parameters.说明: Indicates the params for BLE advertising.
the callback of advertise ID.

error_codes.description: Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
The number of advertising resources reaches the upper limit.
The length of the advertising data exceeds the upper limit.

节点.功能描述: Set the preferred phy associated with the connection. Whether the phy value will be changed depends on the strategy of the Bluetooth chip. A successful call to this interface does not guarantee that the chip's phy value has been successfully set.

节点.功能描述: Manages GATT client. Before calling an Gatt client method, you must use {@link createGattClientDevice} to create an GattClientDevice instance.

Connects to a BLE peripheral device.

The 'BLEConnectionStateChange' event is subscribed to return the connection state.
Disconnects from or stops an ongoing connection to a BLE peripheral device.

Disables a BLE peripheral device.

This method unregisters the device and clears the registered callbacks and handles.

节点.功能描述: Manages the ble scanner. Before calling a ble scanner method, you must use {@link createBleScanner} to create an BleScanner instance.

Starts scanning for specified BLE devices with filters. If you do not want to use filter, set this parameter to {@code null}. the default value will be used. {@link ScanOptions#interval} set to 0, and {@link ScanOptions#dutyMode} set to {@link SCAN_MODE_LOW_POWER} and {@link ScanOptions#matchMode} set to {@link MATCH_MODE_AGGRESSIVE}. and {@link ScanOptions#phyType} set to {@link PHY_LE_ALL_SUPPORTED}. and {@link ScanOptions#reportMode} set to {@link ScanReportMode#NORMAL}.
2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Array<ScanFilter> } filters - Indicates the list of filters used to filter out specified devices.
@param { ScanOptions } options - Indicates the parameters for scanning and if the user does not assign a value,
@returns { Promise<void> } Promise used to return the result.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
@throws { BusinessError } 2900009 - Fails to start scan as it is out of hardware resources.
@throws { BusinessError } 2902050 - Failed to start scan as Ble scan is already started by the app.

parameters.说明: Indicates the list of filters used to filter out specified devices.
Indicates the parameters for scanning and if the user does not assign a value,

Describes the settings for BLE advertising.

Minimum slot value for the advertising interval, which is {@code 32} (20 ms) Maximum slot value for the advertising interval, which is {@code 16777215} (10485.759375s) Default slot value for the advertising interval, which is {@code 1600} (1s)

Minimum transmission power level for advertising, which is {@code -127} Maximum transmission power level for advertising, which is {@code 1} Default transmission power level for advertising, which is {@code -7}
Indicates whether the BLE is connectable, default is {@code true}

Indicates whether the device name will be included in the advertisement packet.
Indicates whether the tx power will be included in the advertisement packet.

Indicates the advertising data.
Indicates the advertising response.

Indicates the duration for advertising continuously. The duration, in 10ms unit. Valid range is from 1 (10ms) to 65535 (655,350 ms). If this parameter is not specified or is set to 0, advertisement is continuously sent.

Indicates the duration for advertising continuously. The duration, in 10ms unit. Valid range is from 1 (10ms) to 65535 (655,350 ms). If this parameter is not specified or is set to 0, advertise is continuously sent.

Report mode used during scan.
In normal mode, the advertisement packet is reported immediately after being scanned.
Enables the batch mode in which advertisement packets are sent after the interval specified by {@link ScanOptions#interval}.
In low sensitivity fence mode, the advertisement packets are reported only when they are received for the first time and lost for the last time. The reception sensitivity is low.
In high sensitivity fence mode, the advertisement packets are reported only when they are received for the first time and lost for the last time. The reception sensitivity is high.
